Predict the Future. Secure the District.

Powered

Detect hidden risks

Identify operational risks before they reach the Board agenda

Accelerate consensus

Move from 9 months to 90 minutes with data-backed modeling

Validate budget decisions

Stress-test financial choices with probability forecasts

Audit equity impacts

Instant analysis of SPED, ELL, and subgroup impacts

Test scenarios

Validate strategy against 15+ plausible future scenarios

The Protocol

How It Works

01

Context Injection

Input your challenge or upload district data to initialize the world model

Example:
Budget shortfall due to 5% enrollment decline
02

Simulation Stress-Test

AI generates multiple future scenarios to test strategy resilience

Example:
Union strike threat + new state mandate
03

Strategic Pivot

Refine plan based on feedback to maximize robustness (IEDMA)

Example:
Shift from cuts to revenue-generating programs

The Science Behind the Simulation

Methodology

IEDMA Analysis

Strategic Robustness Score

Measures the structural integrity of your decision against chaos.

Futures Wheel

Consequence Mapping

Maps the invisible ripple effects of your decision across three orders of impact.

Cross-Impact Matrix

Systems Interconnectivity

Reveals how different system variables fight or fuel each other.

Everything You Need

Powerful tools for data-driven decisions

FBDM Framework

Guided 4-phase futuring process

Scenario Matrices

5 scenario types with risk scoring

Monte Carlo

10K+ iterations with AI analysis

Trend Analysis

Historical data & equity focus

Stakeholder Mapping

Power/Interest grids

Equity Projections

Gap analysis by subgroup
